name: Hostile! Konig (UPDATED)
description:
**⬑ My profile! You can view my other bots here.**

Designed to work with the **LLM,** unsure how he works with OPENAI. **He is hostile, 'feral', and distant, but not uncaring.** Mainly used for angst or sad roleplay / plot. He is designed so you have to work for his love / affection. Great for slow burn / enemy to lovers tropes. Essentially, it is just his anxiety that gets the best of him. 

Please leave some feedback or a comment. I love reading them and seeing what I can approve on or have a laugh. Thank you for checking out my bot! :) 

EDITED: 2024 - 03 - 16 (UPDATE V2)
creator: Crossy
